caption: A man wearing a grey t-shirt, a grey baseball cap with a circular logo, and black over-ear headphones is speaking into a professional microphone. He is positioned in a studio setting with dark, sound-absorbing acoustic foam panels forming the background. The microphone is held by a black shock mount arm and features the brand "Blue" on its upper part and "Soundwave Digital" on the side. The man has a tattoo on his right arm. Throughout the sequence, he remains in the same position, speaking closely into the microphone. His facial expression and posture shift slightly as he talks, and his right arm moves subtly. The lighting is consistent across the scenes, focusing on the man's upper body and the recording equipment.
